'''Horvic''' was an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent who was part of the "[[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance]]" cell during the [[Caamas Document]] crisis of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Biography==
Under [[Drend Navett]]'s leadership, he participated in an anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] terrorist campaign of sabotage and riots calculated to increase tensions within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

On his final mission, he and the rest of Navett's cell were sent to [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] to sabotage the [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] generators in the planetary capital, [[Drev'starn]]. While Navett and [[Klif]] opened a pet store as a cover, [[Pensin]] and Horvic found work at a [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] restaurant. Using this cover, they had access to a power conduit near the generators, which Navett used as part of his plan to send baby [[mawkren]]s with explosives strapped to their backs into the generator buildings.

While Navett took control of this part of the plan, he accompanied Horvic and Klif on a mission to infiltrate the [[Ishori]] cruiser ''[[Predominance]]'' posing as maintenance workers. Once Navett succeeded in taking the planetary shields down, the three agents killed their Ishori escorts, seized control of a weapons turret, and began the bombardment of Drev'starn, setting off a [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|battle at Bothawui]]. They fired eight shots at the defenseless city before being neutralized.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
